text: Would you date your ex's sibling for 2 years (your ex will find out immediately) for $250,000?
Would you let your partner plan your entire wedding (zero input from you, can't veto anything) for $75,000?
Would you fake a relationship for reality TV (The Bachelor/Bachelorette style, 3 months filming) for $500,000?
Would you never be able to say 'I love you' out loud again (can only show it through actions) for $1 million?
Would you go on a blind date arranged by your worst enemy (they know your insecurities) for $50,000?
Would you have your partner's ex move into your home for 1 year (shares common spaces) for $400,000?
Would you let your in-laws choose where you live for 5 years (could be anywhere) for $300,000?
Would you go through your partner's phone right now (they'll never know) for $25,000?
Would you give up dating entirely for 5 years (complete celibacy, no relationships) for $2 million?
Would you have a destination wedding but only 10 guests allowed (must cut half your list) for $150,000?
Would you let your parents arrange blind dates for you every week for a year (must go on all of them) for $150,000?
Would you propose to someone you've been dating for only 1 week (must actually marry them) for $1 million?
Would you live with your in-laws for 3 years (share kitchen, bathroom, no privacy) for $500,000?
Would you let your partner read every text you've ever sent (including before you met) for $100,000?
Would you give up all physical intimacy for 1 year (no sex, no kissing, no touching) for $750,000?
Would you date someone 35 years older than you for 2 years (everyone you know will meet them) for $400,000?
Would you have your first dance at your wedding be to 'Baby Shark' for $75,000?
Would you let your partner choose your hairstyle and color for a year (they choose monthly) for $100,000?
Would you live in separate houses from your spouse for 5 years (can only see them weekends) for $1.5 million?
Would you have your wedding filmed for a reality show (cameras in dressing rooms, bachelor party, everything) for $750,000?
Would you never celebrate any anniversaries or Valentine's Days again (partner agrees) for $200,000?
Would you let your partner permanently ban one of your friends from your life for $150,000?
Would you date someone with completely opposite political views (Trump supporter if you're liberal, or vice versa) for 1 year for $300,000?
Would you get matching face tattoos with someone you met 1 hour ago for $200,000?
Would you let your partner control 100% of finances for 2 years (allowance system, they see everything) for $400,000?
Would you merge all social media with your partner (joint accounts, same posts, can't have separate profiles) for 1 year for $100,000?
Would you let your partner's parents plan your honeymoon (you have no say where, when, or what you do) for $250,000?
Would you give up all your hobbies and interests to adopt only your partner's for 2 years for $150,000?
Would you have your first kiss with your partner broadcast live on Times Square screens for $400,000?
Would you let your partner dress you every day for a year (full outfits, makeup, hair) for $125,000?
Would you move to a random country (chosen by lottery) for your partner for 3 years for $600,000?
Would you give up your dream job (already have the offer) to support your partner's career for $500,000?
Would you have a courthouse wedding (immediate family only, no reception) instead of your dream wedding for $300,000?
Would you let your partner name your future children anything they want (zero input from you) for $750,000?
Would you give your partner all your passwords (email, bank, social media, phone) for $75,000?
Would you go on a televised couple's therapy retreat (Dr. Phil style, aired nationally) for $200,000?
Would you let your ex be the maid of honor or best man at your wedding for $100,000?
Would you sign a prenup giving everything (100% of assets) to your partner if you divorce for $3 million now?
Would you date someone identical to your ex (same personality, appearance, everything) for $400,000?
Would you let your partner plan every single date for 2 years (can't suggest anything yourself) for $150,000?
Would you have your engagement announced by your least favorite person at a family gathering for $50,000?
Would you hyphenate or change to your partner's last name (even if you don't want to) for $250,000?
Would you let your partner decorate your entire home alone (can't veto anything, must live with it 3 years) for $200,000?
Would you be in a long-distance relationship for 5 years (different continents, see each other 2x/year max) for $2 million?
Would you let your partner choose every vacation destination for 10 years (you never get to pick) for $300,000?
Would you have your break-up filmed and aired on reality TV (all fights, tears, everything) for $750,000?
Would you let all your exes attend your wedding (front row seats, invited to reception) for $150,000?
Would you have your couple's therapy sessions broadcast as a podcast (names changed but stories real) for $400,000?
Would you let your partner's parents move in permanently (can never ask them to leave) for $1.5 million?
Would you renew your vows in a different embarrassing theme every year for 10 years (Elvis chapel, underwater, etc.) for $600,000?
